text.message: well, at least the bot knows where to put the robber.
did you get one from blue?
red likes to lie i guess
target on red's back now lolol
im' not trading you a city sorry
i would love for you to move the robber
if that's what you feel is best for your game i get it
best for the community to punish liars
i'm sorry i wasn't willing to trade you a city
the deal was ore for ns.
What’s going on guys? Sorry for disconnexted
red is a liar, don't trust him for deals
i didn't trade orange a city for a ns
if you did non block, sure
but i'm not gunna give a 1 for 1 city for a ns haha
you don't need to lie to not make a deal.
you don't need to extort every time you play a robber
only way to decrease extortion is to non bind
red offered ore for ns.  i stole from blue.  then red decided he didn't want to do deal
blue proceeded to trade them an ore
i still cant get over the fact that red lied to oj
It’s not like orange was winning… why non bind?
they wanted to keep their ore
it was so early in the game too lololol
or because orange has best setup on teh board
the morality crew lost their mind of a non bind and it's gunna cost them teh game
blue's the one that blocked your brick dude
guys we have to punish him
blue it's obvious what you're doing
now shift your focus to who can beat you
my hand makes no sense to mono ore
this is an ore mono though
but no wheat to go with it.
a hand full of brick and no wood is punishment enough :)
or does taht only apply when you need a distraction from getting robbed?
well, you're at 4 poitns.  that's pretty good
Blue is winning guys.. why are u both fighting
we're not really.  we both agree 9 ore is the best block :)
yeah 9 ore is best block lol
to punish red and block blue
dont forget to steal from red tho so he feels the punishment
i don't even know what is going on anymore.
red lied 3 minutes into the game
they were "punishing me" because it got them not robbed by the table
and they tagged along until they needed to try to win
there was a reason, wanted to keep their ore.
and then punishment was no longer the focus
you gotta extend or you lose
i mean, you give a kid time out for a few minutes, not their entire childhood.
